title: lamium galeobdolon
intro: Lamium galeobdolon, also known as yellow archangel or deadnettle, is a flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Lamium galeobdolon include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
